definition:
1. absolute to be lord  or master, gain the mastery , (Aeschulus Tragicus) 
2. with genitive to be lord  or master of , (Homeric Hymns), etc.; δεσπόζειν φόβης to own  the lock of hair, (Aeschulus Tragicus); metaphorically to master , δ. λόγου (Aeschulus Tragicus) 
3. with accusative to lord it over , (Euripides) (ML)
